name: America
declaringWar: The United States of America is concerned about its presence, well, that's the only way now.
attacked: You're shaking things up on the continent!
defeated: Terror has arrived in our lands. The day is yours.
introduction: The United States of America gives you the Greetings.
tradeRequest: The United States need you accept this require.
uniques: When declaring friendship, both parties gain a [10]% boost to great person generation

name: Arabia
declaringWar: I tried to acknowledge your wisdom, but I see that I will have to be rude to you.
attacked: Fool! You're making a big mistake!
defeated: Even with all my wisdom, I was still defeated. Well, it's to your credit that you beat me.
introduction: Who dares approach the great Saladin? Ah, you seem kind, it's an honor to meet you.
uniques: [-25]% Faith cost of generating Great Prophet

name: Brazil
declaringWar: For the peace and progresss, We will stop you actions!
attacked: You really know how i am?
defeated: My sacrifice will keep you united and my name will be your battle flag. Good luck!
introduction: I'm so exciting to meeting you, my man, i'm Getúlio Vargas. the leader of Brazil.
tradeRequest: Don't refuse my offer and me will be kind with you.
uniques: [-15]% Culture cost of natural border growth [in all cities]

name: China
declaringWar: My kindness has run out! I will use force!
attacked: Try, my friend, just try!
denounced: Why you do that? well, i'll take my army for precautions.
defeated: How this going? with my empire, my gracious empire. My mandate is over.
introduction: A foreigner? Hello, i'm Qin Shin Huang, the First Emperor of China
tradeRequest: I need some of your possess.

name: Egypt
declaringWar: Your army is funny! I'll show to you, what is a true army!
attacked: Huh? Since that's the case, we won't have any more conversation!
denounced: Do you think you intimidate anyone with that army?
defeated: We will rise again, I promise this won't stay like this!
introduction: Hail me, the Queen of Egypt. Just a joke, haha! You're welcome.
tradeRequest: I seeing some benefits hading this with you.
uniques: [+100]% Yield from every [Great Improvement] <in [River] tiles> <during a Golden Age>

name: England
declaringWar: You're making a mess everywhere in the world, I'm already tired of you.
attacked: if you want, i'll give it to you. prepare your army!
defeated: We were not able, it's all yours now.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement with England?

name: Greece
declaringWar: That's no lands to escape. Get out my way!
attacked: You think is you better than me?!
denounced: Don't be coward, sharp you sword!
defeated: B-But i'm the son of Zeus! how this happened?
introduction: Good day, foreigner. I am the Alexander, the Great. you're welcome to Macedonia.
tradeRequest: Come here, friend. We need your assists here.
uniques: City-State Influence recovers at twice the normal rate

name: Mali
declaringWar: I have no words to describe how long I've waited for this!
attacked: I've already defeated sorcerers and wizards, you won't stand a chance!
defeated: My mens are dead, the childs and womens too. You nothing than a monster!
introduction: May God bless you. I'm the Great Sundiata Keita, unifier of the great Mali Empire. Come here, let's talk about your empire.

name: Rome
declaringWar: Some empires need's to fall, to other's became more stronger.
attacked: Really?
denounced: I think you are my enemy.
defeated: Empires don't die, they just traform on others.
introduction: Hail, I am Emperor Trajan. If you want a war, I'll give it, If you want be my friend, you're welcome.
uniques: [+15]% Production when constructing [all] buildings [in all cities connected to capital]
[-30]% unhappiness from the number of cities

name: Sumer
declaringWar: I will enjoy hearing your last breath as you witness the destruction of your realm
attacked: Why do we fight? Because Inanna demands it. Now, witness the power of the Sumerians!
defeated: What treachery has struck us? No, what evil?
introduction: Hello, friend. The King of Ur are exciting to meeting you. Call me Gilgamesh, the Great.
tradeRequest: My goods are in the table for you.
uniques: City-State territory always counts as friendly territory

name: Sydney
declaringWar: After thorough deliberation, Australia finds itself at a crossroads. Prepare yourself, for war is upon us.
attacked: We will mobilize every means of resistance to stop this transgression against our nation!
defeated: The principles for which we have fought will survive longer than any nation you could ever build.

name: Vancouver
declaringWar: In responding to the unstinting malignancy that has heretofore defined your relationship with Canada, we can have no recourse but war!
attacked: As we can reach no peaceful resolution with you, Canada must turn, with reluctance, to war.
defeated: I regret not defending my country to the last, although it was not of use.

name: Dublin
declaringWar: War lingers in our hearts. Why carry on with a false peace?
attacked: You gormless radger! You'll dine on your own teeth before you set foot in Ireland!
defeated: A lonely wind blows through the highlands today. A dirge for Ireland. Can you hear it?

name: Edinburgh
declaringWar: You shall stain this land no longer with your vileness! To arms, my countrymen - we ride to war!
attacked: Traitorous man! The Celtic peoples will not stand for such wanton abuse and slander - I shall have your head!
defeated: Vile ruler, know that you 'won' this war in name only!

declaringWar: You leave us no choice. War it must be.

attacked: We are no strangers to war. You have strayed from the right path, and now we will correct it.
defeated: You are nothing but a glorified barbarian. Cruel, and ruthless.
